channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Table Mountain unveils universal access walkway for all visitors
item.description: Table Mountain, one of South Africa's most iconic landmarks, has made a major step towards inclusivity with the introduction of a Universal Access Walkway. Officially opened this week by South African...

item.title: How to style quarter-zip tops for a modern spring wardrobe
item.description: The article highlights the resurgence of the quarter-zip top as a versatile staple for spring fashion, suitable for both men and women. Once popular in the 1990s, the garment is being reintroduced wit...

item.title: University of Windsor celebrates distribution of 1,000 trees to community
item.description: The University of Windsor has successfully reached a milestone in its environmental outreach efforts by distributing its 1,000th tree to the local community. The initiative, designed to promote urban ...

item.title: Umafikizolo’s TikTok-driven Maskandi hit earns Song of the Year at Metro FM Awards
item.description: Umafikizolo has secured a major milestone in South African music after winning Song of the Year at the 2026 Metro FM Music Awards, held at the Durban ICC. His track “Uyoncengwa Unyoko”, which first ga...

item.title: Nova Scotia Mental Health Foundation Awards $1.25M in Grants to Support Mental Health Initiatives
item.description: The Mental Health Foundation of Nova Scotia has announced that it is awarding $1.25 million in grants to various organizations across the province to support mental health programs and initiatives. Th...

item.title: Axolotl Demand Surges, Leading to Rehoming Challenges and Welfare Concerns
item.description: The popularity of axolotls, particularly fuelled by their appearance in the video game Minecraft, has resulted in a surge in demand and subsequent rehoming challenges. Initially, breeders responded to...

item.title: Controversial AFL Score Review Decision Sparks Debate and Delays
item.description: A highly unusual and controversial incident unfolded during the St Kilda versus West Coast Eagles AFL match, leaving fans and commentators baffled. The game was halted almost a minute after play had r...

item.title: Political interference and corruption leave SAPS in crisis, with reform seen as the only solution
item.description: The article reflects on the deepening crisis within the South African Police Service (SAPS), highlighted by the suspension of national commissioner Fannie Masemola. He becomes the latest in a long lin...

item.title: Mans Carpio to File Criminal Complaint Against BSP, AMLC, and House Officials Over Leaked Bank Data

item.title: Testimony Jaga Disagrees with Osinbajo Over Prosperity Gospel Debate
item.description: Popular Nigerian gospel singer, Testimony Jaga, don come out strongly to react to recent comments wey former Vice President Yemi Osinbajo make about prosperity gospel. Osinbajo talk say the idea of pr...

item.title: US and China accelerate plans for crewed lunar missions amid growing strategic rivalry
item.description: The United States and China are intensifying efforts to return humans to the Moon, marking a new phase of strategic competition in space nearly six decades after the Apollo landings. Both nations aim ...

item.title: Details emerging on suspect in White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting

item.title: PM Modi Condemns Shooting at White House Dinner, Reaffirms Democratic Values

item.title: Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner: Timeline and Updates

item.title: Trump's Washington DC Beautification Efforts Earn Unexpected Praise from Democrats
item.description: President Donald Trump's efforts to revitalize Washington, D.C. ahead of the nation’s 250th anniversary have sparked unusual praise from Democrats. Several long-neglected landmarks, including the Meri...

item.title: Important Information on Traffic and Access for Sunday’s Soweto Derby
item.description: Ahead of the highly anticipated Soweto derby at FNB Stadium, organisers have put several measures in place to manage the large crowds expected. Gates will open an hour earlier than usual at 10am to ea...

item.title: Kash Patel's swift actions during shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel reacted quickly and decisively during a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, which took place at the Washington Hilton. The shooter opened fire in the l...

item.title: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee interrupts Bhowanipore rally over alleged BJP disturbance
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee prematurely concluded her public rally in Bhowanipore this Saturday, citing intentional disruption by the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The Chief Minister al...

item.title: Arthur Zwane draws on team spirit and faith as AmaZulu targets CAF qualification
item.description: Arthur Zwane, coach of AmaZulu, remains hopeful after the team’s emphatic 5-1 win over Chippa United. With a young squad, some players still of school-going age, AmaZulu have established themselves am...

item.title: Impact of Iran Conflict: Rising Food and Fuel Prices Could Persist for Months
item.description: Darren Jones, a prominent UK politician, has warned that the effects of the ongoing conflict in Iran may cause a lasting impact on food and fuel prices. These prices could remain elevated for over eig...
